programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization, Part II: The Metal Years
programme.desc: The second in Penelope Spheeris’ trilogy, The Metal Years takes a fast-paced look at the outrageous Heavy Metal scene of the late '80s. Set in Los Angeles, the film explores fascinating portraits of struggling musicians, fans and star-struck groupies. Featuring Alice Cooper, Ozzy Osbourne, Poison and members of Aerosmith, Kiss, and Motorhead as well as performances by Megadeath, Faster Pussycat, Lizzy Borden, London, Odin and Seduce, this raucous and entertaining chapter also chronicles the lonely naiveté of the striving bands, the endless flow of alcohol and drugs and the relentless sexism.

programme.title: Xplash Ep102
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today you’ll meet World Champions and kayaking royalty…the Jackson family, visit China for a slippery run over an ice city, and our first stop is to the Oregon Coast for the biggest waves you've never heard of.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep109: Toxic Invaders
programme.desc: They’re beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They’re lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they’re wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they're potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep308: Wingfoil World Tour in Spain + Women Cliff Divers + Sailing Regatta
programme.desc: World of Watersports showcases the GWA Wingfoil World Tour in Spain, highlights the world's best female Cliff Divers, and heads to South East Asia for the prestigious Royal Langkawi Sailing Regatta.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep102: Antarctica
programme.desc: Violent oceans, giant icebergs and incredible scenery are all in a day’s work in the Southern Continent. Host Bill Ball shadows penguin researchers as they take population counts of one of the most fascinating birds on earth.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Ever-increasing rainfall, coupled with monocultural farming, is eradicating the topsoil in Iowa farms. With an estimate that all topsoil in the area will be gone within 35 years, the race is on to change farming culture. Elizabeth Garst and her farm are at the forefront of the fight to educate farmers and the public on the necessity of cover crops and soil health. Elizabeth’s ancestors turned Dust Bowl land into a thriving farm with morals, and she’s not stopping there.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: This week, host Laura visits a family who has taken backyard farming to a whole new level. The Killpatrick family led by husband and father Michael is paving the way for the next generation of regenerative farming. This farm sprouted from the 2020 pandemic and in a few short years has become a pivotal cornerstone of their city community for all things holistic and organic. The Farm on Central is proving what can be accomplished with dedication to the future of farming.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2020 - Part 4
programme.desc: Who will become the newest WPT champion? The final round of WPT Choctaw is here in Las Vegas and $380,000 awaiting the winner at HyperX Esports Arena. Craig Varnell, Will Berry, and Nick Pupillo all make their claim to win one of the best titles in poker.

programme.title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions 2020 - Part 1
programme.desc: An elite field of the best poker players in the world convene in Las Vegas for the Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions. The final table is set from 76 WPT Champions who ponied up $15,000 to play in the event. WPT Commentator Tony Dunst looks for another major career title and faces stiff competition versus poker made millionaires Nick Schulman and Ryan Tosoc, along with WPT European Championship winner Ole Schemion. $440,000 and one of the most grand titles in poker will be won at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions 2020 - Part 2
programme.desc: Ole Schemion leads the final table in Las Vegas in the race to win another WPT title and the $440,000 first-place prize. Tony Dunst is right behind him and elite poker is being played at HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas and a luxurious Hublot watch up for grabs.

programme.title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions 2020 - Part 3
programme.desc: WPT Champion and commentator Tony Dunst nears a second WPT title, can he close out the $440,000 victory? WPT Five Diamond champion Ryan Tosoc has something to say about Dunst’s quest for another win and Ole Schemion remains out in front at HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions 2020 - Part 4
programme.desc: Ole Schemion and WPT Commentator Tony Dunst square off for $440,000 and the Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament Champions title at one of the most elite tournaments of the year. The best poker on TV is at HyperX Esports Arena as Season XVII of the World Poker Tour closes with a grand finale.
